mapper.select: SELECT CAT_SEQ, FAMILY_ID, CAT_NM, SORT_ORDER, USE_YN, REG_ID, REG_DT, UPD_ID, UPD_DT FROM LIVING_BUDGET_CAT WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SORT_ORDER, CAT_SEQ
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LIVING_BUDGET_CAT (FAMILY_ID, CAT_NM, SORT_ORDER, USE_YN, REG_ID, REG_DT) VALUES (#{familyId}, #{catNm}, COALESCE(#{sortOrder}, (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SORT_ORDER),0)+10 FROM LIVING_BUDGET_CAT t WHERE t.FAMILY_ID=#{familyId})), 'Y', #{regId}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE LIVING_BUDGET_CAT SET CAT_NM = #{catNm}, SORT_ORDER = #{sortOrder}, USE_YN = COALESCE(#{useYn}, USE_YN), UPD_ID = #{updId}, UPD_DT = NOW() WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND CAT_SEQ = #{catSeq}
mapper.select: SELECT i.ITEM_SEQ, i.FAMILY_ID, i.CAT_SEQ, c.CAT_NM, i.ITEM_NM, i.BUDGET_AMT, i.INCOME_PLAN_SEQ, p.PLAN_NM AS INCOME_PLAN_NM, i.CC_SEQ, cc.CC_NM, i.SORT_ORDER, i.USE_YN, i.DEL_YN, i.MEMO, i.REG_ID, i.REG_DT, i.UPD_ID, i.UPD_DT FROM LIVING_BUDGET_ITEM i JOIN LIVING_BUDGET_CAT c ON c.CAT_SEQ = i.CAT_SEQ LEFT JOIN CASH_FLOW_PLAN_MST p ON p.PLAN_SEQ = i.INCOME_PLAN_SEQ LEFT JOIN COST_CENTER_MST cc ON cc.CC_SEQ = i.CC_SEQ WHERE i.FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND i.DEL_YN = 'N' AND c.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY c.SORT_ORDER, c.CAT_SEQ, i.SORT_ORDER, i.ITEM_SEQ

SELECT i.ITEM_SEQ, i.FAMILY_ID, i.CAT_SEQ, c.CAT_NM, i.ITEM_NM, i.BUDGET_AMT, i.INCOME_PLAN_SEQ, p.PLAN_NM AS INCOME_PLAN_NM, i.CC_SEQ, cc.CC_NM, i.SORT_ORDER, i.USE_YN, i.DEL_YN, i.MEMO, i.REG_ID, i.REG_DT, i.UPD_ID, i.UPD_DT FROM LIVING_BUDGET_ITEM i JOIN LIVING_BUDGET_CAT c ON c.CAT_SEQ = i.CAT_SEQ LEFT JOIN CASH_FLOW_PLAN_MST p ON p.PLAN_SEQ = i.INCOME_PLAN_SEQ LEFT JOIN COST_CENTER_MST cc ON cc.CC_SEQ = i.CC_SEQ WHERE i.FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND i.ITEM_SEQ = #{itemSeq}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LIVING_BUDGET_ITEM (FAMILY_ID, CAT_SEQ, ITEM_NM, BUDGET_AMT, INCOME_PLAN_SEQ, CC_SEQ, SORT_ORDER, USE_YN, DEL_YN, MEMO, REG_ID, REG_DT) VALUES (#{familyId}, #{catSeq}, #{itemNm}, #{budgetAmt}, #{incomePlanSeq}, #{ccSeq}, COALESCE(#{sortOrder}, 0), 'Y', 'N', #{memo}, #{regId}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE LIVING_BUDGET_ITEM SET CAT_SEQ = #{catSeq}, ITEM_NM = #{itemNm}, BUDGET_AMT = #{budgetAmt}, INCOME_PLAN_SEQ = #{incomePlanSeq}, CC_SEQ = #{ccSeq}, SORT_ORDER = #{sortOrder}, MEMO = #{memo}, UPD_ID = #{updId}, UPD_DT = NOW() WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND ITEM_SEQ = #{itemSeq}
mapper.select: SELECT m.EXP_SEQ, m.FAMILY_ID, m.EXP_YYMM, m.MEMO, m.REG_ID, m.REG_DT, m.UPD_ID, m.UPD_DT, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(i.BUDGET_AMT) FROM LIVING_BUDGET_ITEM i JOIN LIVING_BUDGET_CAT c ON c.CAT_SEQ = i.CAT_SEQ WHERE i.FAMILY_ID = m.FAMILY_ID AND i.DEL_YN = 'N' AND c.USE_YN = 'Y'), 0) AS TOTAL_BUDGET_AMT, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(d.ACTUAL_AMT) FROM LIVING_EXPENSE_DTL d WHERE d.EXP_SEQ = m.EXP_SEQ), 0) AS TOTAL_ACTUAL_AMT FROM LIVING_EXPENSE_MST m WHERE m.FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} ORDER BY m.EXP_YYMM DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LIVING_EXPENSE_MST (FAMILY_ID, EXP_YYMM, MEMO, REG_ID, REG_DT) VALUES (#{familyId}, #{expYymm}, #{memo}, #{regId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT d.DTL_SEQ, d.EXP_SEQ, d.ITEM_SEQ, i.CAT_SEQ, c.CAT_NM, i.ITEM_NM, i.BUDGET_AMT, d.ACTUAL_AMT, d.MEMO, d.REG_ID, d.REG_DT, d.UPD_ID, d.UPD_DT FROM LIVING_EXPENSE_DTL d JOIN LIVING_BUDGET_ITEM i ON i.ITEM_SEQ = d.ITEM_SEQ JOIN LIVING_BUDGET_CAT c ON c.CAT_SEQ = i.CAT_SEQ WHERE d.EXP_SEQ = #{expSeq} AND i.FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} ORDER BY c.SORT_ORDER, c.CAT_SEQ, i.SORT_ORDER, i.ITEM_SEQ
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LIVING_EXPENSE_DTL (EXP_SEQ, ITEM_SEQ, ACTUAL_AMT, MEMO, REG_ID, REG_DT, UPD_ID, UPD_DT) VALUES (#{expSeq}, #{itemSeq}, #{actualAmt}, #{memo}, #{regId}, NOW(), #{updId}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE ACTUAL_AMT = VALUES(ACTUAL_AMT), MEMO = VALUES(MEMO), UPD_ID = VALUES(UPD_ID), UPD_DT = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT i.INCOME_SEQ, i.FAMILY_ID, i.CC_SEQ, cc.CC_NM, i.FLOW_TYPE, i.INCOME_YYMM, i.ACTUAL_AMT, i.MEMO, i.REG_ID, i.REG_DT, i.UPD_ID, i.UPD_DT FROM LIVING_INCOME_MST i JOIN COST_CENTER_MST cc ON cc.CC_SEQ = i.CC_SEQ WHERE i.FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND i.INCOME_YYMM BETWEEN #{fromYymm} AND #{toYymm} ORDER BY i.FLOW_TYPE, i.INCOME_YYMM, cc.SORT_ORDER, i.CC_SEQ

SELECT i.INCOME_SEQ, i.FAMILY_ID, i.CC_SEQ, cc.CC_NM, i.FLOW_TYPE, i.INCOME_YYMM, i.ACTUAL_AMT, i.MEMO, i.REG_ID, i.REG_DT, i.UPD_ID, i.UPD_DT FROM LIVING_INCOME_MST i JOIN COST_CENTER_MST cc ON cc.CC_SEQ = i.CC_SEQ WHERE i.FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND i.INCOME_YYMM = #{incomeYymm} AND i.FLOW_TYPE = 'INCOME' ORDER BY cc.SORT_ORDER, i.CC_SEQ

SELECT i.INCOME_SEQ, i.FAMILY_ID, i.CC_SEQ, cc.CC_NM, i.FLOW_TYPE, i.INCOME_YYMM, i.ACTUAL_AMT, i.MEMO, i.REG_ID, i.REG_DT, i.UPD_ID, i.UPD_DT FROM LIVING_INCOME_MST i JOIN COST_CENTER_MST cc ON cc.CC_SEQ = i.CC_SEQ WHERE i.FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND i.INCOME_YYMM = #{yymm} ORDER BY i.FLOW_TYPE DESC, cc.SORT_ORDER, i.CC_SEQ
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LIVING_INCOME_MST (FAMILY_ID, CC_SEQ, FLOW_TYPE, INCOME_YYMM, ACTUAL_AMT, MEMO, REG_ID, REG_DT, UPD_ID, UPD_DT) VALUES (#{familyId}, #{ccSeq}, COALESCE(#{flowType}, 'INCOME'), #{incomeYymm}, #{actualAmt}, #{memo}, #{regId}, NOW(), #{updId}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE ACTUAL_AMT = VALUES(ACTUAL_AMT), MEMO = VALUES(MEMO), UPD_ID = VALUES(UPD_ID), UPD_DT = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT c.CAT_SEQ, c.CAT_NM, COALESCE(SUM(i.BUDGET_AMT), 0) AS TOTAL_BUDGET_AMT, COALESCE(SUM(d.ACTUAL_AMT), 0) AS TOTAL_ACTUAL_AMT FROM LIVING_BUDGET_CAT c JOIN LIVING_BUDGET_ITEM i ON i.CAT_SEQ = c.CAT_SEQ AND i.DEL_YN = 'N' AND i.FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} LEFT JOIN LIVING_EXPENSE_MST m ON m.FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND m.EXP_YYMM BETWEEN #{fromYymm} AND #{toYymm} LEFT JOIN LIVING_EXPENSE_DTL d ON d.EXP_SEQ = m.EXP_SEQ AND d.ITEM_SEQ = i.ITEM_SEQ WHERE c.FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND c.USE_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY c.CAT_SEQ, c.CAT_NM, c.SORT_ORDER ORDER BY c.SORT_ORDER, c.CAT_SEQ
